pizzas.name: Pepperoni
pizzas.description: The classic pizza, topped with tomato sauce, mozzarella cheese, and pepperoni.

pizzas.name: Margherita
pizzas.description: A simple yet delicious pizza with tomato sauce, fresh mozzarella cheese, and basil leaves.

pizzas.name: Vegetarian
pizzas.description: A medley of fresh vegetables including bell peppers, onions, mushrooms, and olives on tomato sauce and mozzarella cheese.
pizzas.subtext: bell peppers, onions, mushrooms, olives, tomato sauce, mozzarella

pizzas.name: BBQ Chicken
pizzas.description: Grilled chicken, red onions, and barbecue sauce on a bed of mozzarella and cheddar cheese.
pizzas.subtext: grilled chicken, red onions, barbecue sauce, mozzarella, cheddar

pizzas.name: Hawaiian
pizzas.description: A tropical delight with ham, pineapple chunks, and mozzarella cheese on tomato sauce.

pizzas.name: Mushroom Lovers
pizzas.description: A mushroom extravaganza with three types of mushrooms and mozzarella cheese on a creamy garlic sauce.
pizzas.subtext: button mushrooms, shiitake mushrooms, cremini mushrooms, mozzarella, creamy garlic sauce

pizzas.name: Supreme
pizzas.description: A hearty pizza loaded with pepperoni, sausage, bell peppers, onions, and olives on tomato sauce and mozzarella cheese.
pizzas.subtext: pepperoni, sausage, bell peppers, onions, olives, tomato sauce, mozzarella

pizzas.name: Pesto Chicken
pizzas.description: Grilled chicken, cherry tomatoes, and pesto sauce on a bed of mozzarella and parmesan cheese.
pizzas.subtext: grilled chicken, cherry tomatoes, pesto sauce, mozzarella, parmesan

pizzas.name: Buffalo Chicken
pizzas.description: Spicy buffalo sauce, grilled chicken, red onions, and mozzarella cheese.
pizzas.subtext: buffalo sauce, grilled chicken, red onions, mozzarella

pizzas.name: Four Cheese
pizzas.description: A blend of mozzarella, cheddar, parmesan, and feta cheese on a tomato sauce base.
pizzas.subtext: mozzarella, cheddar, parmesan, feta, tomato sauce
